# Aadesh Kumar

Aadesh Kumar is a freelance web developer, programmer, and automation specialist building modern web products, automation workflows, landing pages, booking pages, and microservices for businesses and personal brands.

## Key services
- Freelance automation services
- Landing page development
- Booking page development
- Microservices and scalable web solutions
- Next.js, React, and Python development
- SEO, AEO, and GEO-friendly digital presence

## Portfolio links
- https://aadeshkumar-portfolio.vercel.app/
- https://aadeshkumar-portfolio.vercel.app/projects
- https://aadeshkumar-portfolio.vercel.app/projects/japp-tattva
- https://aadeshkumar-portfolio.vercel.app/automation
- https://aadeshkumar-portfolio.vercel.app/education
- https://aadeshkumar-portfolio.vercel.app/resume

## Featured project
Japp Tattva is one of Aadesh Kumar's personal project case studies, showcasing work on branding, digital presence, storytelling, and SEO-friendly web execution.
